title: More Slabs!
description: 🌟 A clever solution for allowing you to recraft slabs back into full blocks.
body:
# 🌟 More Slabs - Recraft the Full Blocks! 🌟

Do you ever find yourself frustrated by the resource drain when crafting full blocks into slabs, only to realize you need those blocks in their original form later? Fear not! "More Slabs" has come to your rescue! 🚀 This Minecraft datapack presents an ingenious solution, enabling you to recraft slabs back into full blocks effortlessly. With "More Slabs," you have the power to convert any slab back into a full block, granting you unparalleled resource efficiency. Say farewell to the agony of wasted building blocks! 🏗️

## 🛠️ Features:

- **Reverse Crafting:** Effortlessly convert slabs back into full blocks.
- **Resource Efficiency:** Maximize your materials and keep your inventory organized.
- **User-Friendly:** Craft with convenience at any crafting table.
- **Block Compatibility:** Works seamlessly with all available slab types.

## 🏡 Build with Confidence:

"More Slabs" is the ultimate datapack for builders and resource-conscious players. Never again will you let your resources go to waste! Craft your way to perfection with "More Slabs" by your side. 💪

## 💚 Leave Your Feedback:

If you find this datapack valuable, please consider leaving a review and rating. Your feedback is highly appreciated. 🙏

*Note: This datapack is designed for Minecraft versions `1.20.*`.*
